base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of axl_grunt — a character (minion) from 1989 final fight. Axl — standard punk grunt, multi-palette variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Axl — standard punk grunt, multi-palette variants
